title: Video Downloader Pro
shortDescription: Download videos, playlists, and MP3 audio with quality selection, 4K support, batch downloads, Private Mode, and a clean ad-free workflow.
description:
Download videos, playlists, and MP3 audio with smart quality selection, 4K support when available, batch downloads, and a clean ad-free experience.

Video Downloader gives you a simple and organized way to download videos and audio without unnecessary steps. Paste a link, choose the quality you want, add single videos or multiple URLs, and manage everything from a clear download queue with live progress, speed, ETA, and error details.

You can also browse and search YouTube inside the app, convert videos to MP3, save thumbnails or subtitles when available, skip already downloaded items, and use Private Mode to reduce local activity visibility inside the app.
features: Playlist Downloads — download full YouTube playlists in one go
Quality Selector — choose your preferred resolution before downloading
MP3 Conversion — convert videos to MP3 for audio-only use
In-App YouTube Browser — browse, open, and download without switching apps
Private Mode — untracked downloads (no local history saved)
Multi-Platform Support — YouTube, Instagram, and more
Fast, No Ads Experience — clean workflow, focused on speed and convenience
Improved quality selection with support for more available formats
Added Batch Add for downloading multiple URLs more easily
Upgraded download queue with progress, speed, ETA, and error details
benefits: Create or manage visual assets faster
Prepare content for publishing with less friction
Built around playlist Downloads — download full YouTube playlists in one go
Built around quality Selector — choose your preferred resolution before downloading

screenshots.caption: Paste link or browse : Start with a URL, or use the built-in browsing flow when that is easier.
Quality control : Pick your preferred resolution and keep results consistent across downloads.

Playlists & batching : 
Download multiple items in one pass—ideal for playlists and course content.

Convert to MP3 : 
Keep audio separately for podcasts, lectures, or music playlists.

Private Mode : 
Designed to keep your session clean inside the app (history/cache).

Download queue : 
Monitor progress and keep downloads organized and easy to locate.
Clean output : Use consistent save settings so files land where you expect—every time.

Browse in-app : 
Search, preview, then download—useful when you do not want to switch windows.
